title: cymbidium cyperifolium var. aliciae
intro: Cymbidium cyperifolium var. aliciae, also known as the 'Cyperus-leaved Cymbidium', is a rare and endangered species of orchid that is native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cymbidium cyperifolium var. aliciae include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which are prepared by drying and grinding the leaves and flowers of the plant.
